trigger_eval.method: manual prediction (HOUSECARL_SKILL_AUTHORING.md §6.5 fallback; empirical run_loop needs a non-Windows host, session is Windows 11)
trigger_eval.followup: Flagged for empirical run_loop re-validation on a non-Windows host + one independent peer prediction check (§6.5 items 3-4). Tracked in STATE.md Phase-1 notes.

round_trip.method: Blind live-analogy derivation: predict REQ_Weapon_Orcish_WarAxe (01398B) from comparables ONLY (Steel War Axe 013983 for type-shape; steel->orcish sword step 013989/013991 for the material delta), without reading the target first; then diff against the houseCARL winner.

predicted.damage_type_keyword: none in source (Reqtificator assigns slash from WeapTypeWarAxe)

actual.damage_type_keyword: absent in source winner; chain Skyrim.esm -> USSEP -> Requiem.esp

round_trip.notes: Exact match on all 9 derived fields. The value-derivation method (steel->orcish material ratio = 225/45 = 5x, applied to the steel war axe value 55 -> 275) reproduced the real value exactly, validating the keyword/material-driven value rule. The crit = floor(Damage/2) rule held. The source carries no damage-type keyword, confirming it is a Reqtificator output.
